title: Site Feature Flags
description: Build-time feature flags for the templates.comfy.org site. Imported as a JSON module and bundled at build. Mirrors a subset of the main Vue app's remoteConfig flags so the two systems can be unified later.

cloudFreeTier.description: When true, render Cloud free-tier promotional copy: the 'Try Comfy Cloud for free' hub navbar CTA and the '✦ Get Free Credits' subline under the Try-on-Cloud CTA on template detail pages (in all 11 locales). When false, those promotional bits are hidden and replaced with neutral text. Does not affect 'free, ready-to-use ComfyUI workflows' meta copy or 'Free Templates' SEO titles, which describe the open-source templates themselves rather than the cloud free-tier subscription. Mirrors remoteConfig.new_free_tier_subscriptions in the main Vue app.
